   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "age_counts = df['Age_band_of_driver'].value_counts()\n",
    "age_counts = age_counts[age_counts.index.notnull() & (age_counts.index != 'Unknown')]\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "x_values = range(len(age_counts))\n",
    "accident_counts = age_counts.values\n",
    "age_groups = age_counts.index\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.scatter(x_values, accident_counts)\n",
    "plt.title(\"Accidents by Driver Age Group\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Age Group\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Number of Accidents\")\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xticks(x_values, age_groups, rotation=45)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

    "        subset[\"Number_of_casualties\"],\n",
    "        alpha=0.4,\n",
    "        label=sev\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Number of vehicles involved\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Number of casualties\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Scatter Plot: Vehicles Involved vs Casualties\")\n",
    "plt.legend(title=\"Accident severity\")\n",
    "plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
